current_recraft_pass.name: tutorial_duology_and_forward_buffer_pass
current_recraft_pass.purpose: Use the current pass to ship two tutorial deliverables while buffering ahead into the market-finish full game instead of producing tutorial-only throwaway assets.

hub_world_landscapes_tilesets.purpose: Fill the hub and world landscape, environment, and tileset backlog with usable forward-production assets.

weapons_and_armor.purpose: Cover starter and upgrade-path weapons and armor with market-finish-ready silhouettes and modular breakdowns.

remaining_priority_content.purpose: Finish basic-tier enemies, support-dread UI telemetry, hub dialogue and object packs, and runtime calibration.

traceability_requirements.goal: Every generated 2D asset can be tracked forward into 3D models, rigs, animations, runtime packs, and final game usage without losing source intent or budget ownership.

quality_posture.objective: contemporary premium readability and market finish within current budget reality
quality_posture.non_goal: unbounded guarantee language not supported by current capital, time, or vendor validation
discipline: use hard traceability instead of vague quality claims
keep tutorial assets reusable in the shipping game
treat the tutorial pass as the first shippable content slice, not a disposable prototype
